rationale: Initial reward design based on the environment understanding and reward schema. The reward combines penalties for distance, velocity, angle, and fuel usage to encourage stable, centered descent. A touchdown bonus is given for a successful landing (both legs contact, near pad, low velocity, upright). A terminal penalty is applied for failure (crash or out-of-bounds). Weights are set to keep components comparable and total reward within bounds.

components.expression: 100.0 if (done and obs[6]==1.0 and obs[7]==1.0 and abs(obs[0])<0.1 and abs(obs[2])<0.1 and abs(obs[3])<0.1 and abs(obs[4])<0.1) else 0.0
components.description: Large bonus for successful landing at pad

components.expression: -100.0 if (done and not (obs[6]==1.0 and obs[7]==1.0 and abs(obs[0])<0.1 and abs(obs[2])<0.1 and abs(obs[3])<0.1 and abs(obs[4])<0.1)) else 0.0
